title: 10 best herbal teas for throat irritation
description: Rosemary teas helps with throat irritation because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe and calm irritated mucous membranes. The herbal tea's flavonoids and phenolic acids help to reduce inflammation and ease discomfort associated with sore throats, laryngitis, and tonsillitis.
